sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43439" key="eu)apo/sbestos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐαπό-σβεστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43439.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to extinguish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
